name: Columbus Circle Capital Corp II
summary: Columbus Circle Capital Corp II (CMII) is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company has not yet completed an initial Business Combination and is seeking an appropriate target business, with proceeds held in a Trust Account pending such transaction.
